content:
Readings, Presentations, Knowledge Checks, & Activities Schedule | Weeks 1 - 6 | ENG 101 | V3


📌 ENG 101 | Weekly Course Schedule (Weeks 1 - 6)

(This is an internal schedule for structuring readings, presentations, discussions, assignments, quizzes, and knowledge checks.)

📖 Standardized Terminology Key

Term Definition
📖 Textbook Reading Assigned chapters or sections from the course textbook. These provide foundational concepts and detailed explanations.
📂 Canvas Presentation Instructor-created slide decks or interactive lectures uploaded to Canvas. These summarize key concepts and serve as instructional material.
✅ Knowledge Check Short quizzes or exercises that assess students’ understanding of specific concepts. These are formative assessments, meaning they help students gauge their learning but may not count heavily toward the final grade.
💬 Discussion In-class or online conversations where students explore a topic in depth. Discussions encourage critical thinking, peer engagement, and application of concepts.
